# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover authentic handmade ceramics crafted with passion in our boutique studio. Each piece tells a story. Pre-order your unique pottery today.

### Studio
https://example.com/studio
Step into a working ceramic studio where art comes to life. Experience the authentic atmosphere of a boutique pottery workspace and creative process.

### Works
https://example.com/works
Browse exclusive handcrafted ceramic pieces designed for collectors. Each artwork is made with care and available through our personal pre-order system.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Join our community of ceramic enthusiasts. Reserve your handcrafted piece through our fair pickup model and experience personal artist connection.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Tali Ceramics

### Cart
https://example.com/cart
Your Cart

### Checkout
https://example.com/checkout
Checkout

### Login
https://example.com/login
Customer Login

### Account
https://example.com/account
My Account

### Order Success
https://example.com/order-success
Thank you for your order

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Tali Ceramics

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Tali Ceramics
